title: tilia × banatica
intro: Tilia × banatica, also known as the Banatica lime tree or Banatica linden, is a hybrid species of the Tilia genus, derived from the cross between Tilia tomentosa and Tilia cordata. This deciduous tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tilia × banatica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for calming the mind and body. Tilia × banatica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
